arts.ttl: Unai Emery makes Southampton prediction and fires Aston Villa warning
arts.sum: Unai Emery has warned his Aston Villa players not to underestimate Southampton, despite the Saints having already been relegated from the Premier League in record time. "The teams like Southampton in the bottom and now when they are relegated for the next year, they are not going to lose every match," Emery claimed.
